name: python3-lazr.uri
title: python3-lazr.uri
summary: library for parsing, manipulating, and generating URIs
description:
library for parsing, manipulating, and generating URIs
A self-contained, easily reusable, Python library for parsing,
manipulating and generating URIs. With it you can extract parts
of a URL, compare URIs to see if one contains another, search for
URIs in text, and many other things.
.
This package contains the library for Python 3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-lazr.uri because library for parsing, manipulating, and generating URIs.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-lazr.uri as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-lazr.uri with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-lazr.uri --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
